search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=4776" AND (Keywords="Success Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Success")) OR ("EventCode=680" AND (Keywords="Success Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Success")) NOT (Logon_Account="*$$" OR User_Account="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") | eval "User_Account" = coalesce(Logon_Account,User_Account,TargetUserName) | transaction "User_Account",Source_Workstation maxpause=5s | timechart minspan=1h count

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=4776" AND (Keywords="Success Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Success")) OR ("EventCode=680" AND (Keywords="Success Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Success")) NOT (Logon_Account="*$$" OR User_Account="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") | eval "User_Account" = coalesce(Logon_Account,User_Account,TargetUserName) | transaction "User_Account",Source_Workstation maxpause=5s | timechart minspan=1h count by User_Account | rename User_Account AS "User Account"

`windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=4776" AND (Keywords="Success Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Success")) OR ("EventCode=680" AND (Keywords="Success Audit" OR Keywords="Audit Success")) NOT (Logon_Account="*$$" OR User_Account="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") | eval "User_Account" = coalesce(Logon_Account,User_Account,TargetUserName) | transaction "User_Account",Source_Workstation maxpause=5s | timechart minspan=1h count by host

panel.title: NTLM Successful Logins By Host, User, Source Workstation

search.query: `windowsindex` `windowssourcetype` ("EventCode=4776" AND Keywords="Audit Success") OR ("EventCode=680" AND "Success Audit") NOT (Logon_Account="*$$" OR User_Account="*$$" OR TargetUserName="*$$") | eval "User_Account" = coalesce(Logon_Account,User_Account,TargetUserName) | transaction "User_Account",Source_Workstation maxpause=5 | search ComputerName="$Server$" Source_Workstation="$Workstation$" User_Account="$UserAccount$" | stats count by User_Account,Source_Workstation,ComputerName | table User_Account Source_Workstation ComputerName count | sort -count | rename User_Account AS "User Account" Source_Workstation AS "Source Workstation" ComputerName AS "Server"
